I need the final asset specs so I can start scheduling our teaser posts in Buffer.

attributes.context: I want one more day to sync with the PR team

extractions.extraction_text: I'll update the project timeline in Asana right after this call.

text:
Julian: Hey everyone, let's get the ball rolling. I’ve uploaded the initial logo concepts to our shared board. Amara, have you had a chance to look at the color palettes?
Amara: I have. I think the "Midnight Teal" aligns better with our target demographic's preferences. It feels more premium. You can see the full market research breakdown on Statista if you want the data behind that.
Liam: I like the teal, too. It’ll pop on Instagram. Speaking of which, I need the final asset specs so I can start scheduling our teaser posts in Buffer.
Julian: I can have those specs ready by Thursday morning. Amara, are we still aiming for a Monday reveal?
Amara: Let's push it to Tuesday. I want one more day to sync with the PR team. I'll update the project timeline in Asana right after this call.
Julian: Sounds good. Let's make it happen.
